title: Fat Kitties
description: A fabric resource pack about making da cats fat
body:
## This is a Fabric resourcepack about making dem kitties FAT! 
If you want fat cats then this is the resourcepack. 

Required mods are these:
> https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features
>
> https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

![Fat Kitties](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3b48e1a7731a41fe2499aab4c04a69b2413b603.png)
